description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet, featuring a prominent display screen set within a tall, rectangular housing. The front panel is adorned with a colorful control panel, divided into four quadrants with distinct red, blue, yellow, and green sections, each equipped with buttons and joysticks for multiplayer gameplay. Above the screen, a marquee displays the game title 'GAUNTLET' in bold, stylized lettering with fantasy-themed artwork. The lower front section includes two coin slots and access panels, typical of coin-operated arcade machines. The side panels are plain black, lacking any additional artwork or decals. The cabinet is constructed primarily from wood and plastic, with metal components for the controls and coin mechanisms, and features a CRT display with a curved screen.
description: A tall, upright arcade game cabinet with a colorful four-player control panel, a CRT screen, and a fantasy-themed 'GAUNTLET' marquee. The sides are plain black, and the front features coin slots and access panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'GAUNTLET' marquee, CRT screen, colorful four-player control panel, and dual coin slots.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the plain black side panel and the cabinet's angular profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a featureless black back panel with no visible artwork or access points.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with a plain black side and the cabinet's distinctive shape.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium-sized with a thick bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Four sets of controls, each with a joystick and two buttons, arranged in a semi-circular layout with distinct colored sections for each player
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'GAUNTLET' title in stylized yellow-green text with fantasy-themed artwork and a dark background
